Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Off Calendar

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2021 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Attys. MARIA G. ENRIQUEZ, Esq. and MARGARET M. SCHUCHARDT, Esq. of Jaszczuk P.C. (Tel: 312-442-0509) and TERRY J. MOLLICA, Esq. of Mollica Law (Tel: 925-239-2389) for plaintiffs Crunch Holdings, LLC, Crunch, LLC, and Crunch Franchising LLC (via Zoom videoconference):
Attys. G. DAVID GODWIN, Esq. and THOMAS J. LLOYD, Esq. of Squire Patton Boggs (US) LLP (Tel: 415-954-0200), and DAN MILLEA, Esq. (Tel: 612-339-2020) and THOMAS D'ANTONIO, Esq. (Tel: 415-693-0700) for defendant Zurich American Insurance Company (via Zoom videoconference except for Mr. Godwin appearing in person).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ZURICH AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Zurich American Insurance Co.'s demurrer to complaint is sustained without leave to amend. (See Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 430.10(e) [failure to state a cause of action].) (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS CRUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC, CRUNCH, LLC, AND CRUNCH FRANCHISING, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT MARGARET M. SCHUCHARDT AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The verified application of Margaret M. Schuchardt for admission pro hac vice as counsel to plaintiffs is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CRUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC, CRUNCH, LLC, CRUNCH FRANCHISING, LLC MOTION TO ADMIT MARIA G. ENRIQUEZ AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The verified application of Maria G. Enriquez for admission pro hac vice as counsel to plaintiffs is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
